summary: Implemented deterministic Kanban dispatcher review-required auto-unblock: linked review children move to review when a running/blocked source publishes a valid review_required marker or structured report; dry-run reports the transition without mutation; CLI/gateway logs expose review_unblocked counts.
route_used: OMX-assisted read-only analysis via `omx exec -s read-only`; Liz implemented and verified the patch directly after parent-side inspection.

commands.summary: OMX available at /opt/homebrew/bin/omx; produced read-only implementation plan.

commands.command: python -m pytest tests/hermes_cli/test_kanban_db.py -q -k 'review_required or dispatch_dry_run_does_not_claim or dispatch_promotes_ready_and_spawns' -o 'addopts='
commands.summary: System Python lacked pytest; switched to project uv environment.

commands.command: uv run python -m pytest tests/hermes_cli/test_kanban_db.py -q -k 'review_required or dispatch_dry_run_does_not_claim or dispatch_promotes_ready_and_spawns' -o 'addopts='
commands.summary: Initial regression run found task_runs has no result column; fixed query to summary/metadata only.

commands.command: uv run python -m pytest tests/hermes_cli/test_kanban_db.py -q -k 'review_required or dispatch_dry_run_does_not_claim or dispatch_promotes_ready_and_spawns' -o 'addopts='

migration.rollback_notes: Revert the changes in the four changed_files listed above; no database migration or data cleanup was performed.

production_actions.summary: No production action; local code and test execution only.

residual_risks: Repository had unrelated dirty work before and during this run; review should separate this patch from pre-existing mission-state/status-warning changes before merge.
Review-child detection is conservative and text-based: child title/body must contain review/reviewer/reviewing to avoid auto-promoting arbitrary blocked children.
Structured reports are parsed from task result, comments, and run summary/metadata only; report paths are treated as evidence pointers and are not opened/executed.
